history.text: Văn Lang appears in Vietnam's historical record.
Âu Lạc appears in Vietnam's historical record.
Han's annexation changed control of the territory.
Vietnam became independent from China, marking a key step in modern statehood.
Regaining independence restored Vietnam's own statehood after foreign domination.
Nguyễn's unification appears in Vietnam's historical record.
Protectorate Treaty placed the territory under outside administration.
A declaration of independence was issued, making sovereignty the central political claim.

worthSeeing.title: Ha Long Bay:
worthSeeing.text: UNESCO World Heritage bay of 1,600 limestone karst islands emerging from emerald water.

worthSeeing.title: Hoi An:
worthSeeing.text: UNESCO-listed ancient port town of lantern-lit canals, tailors, and fusion cuisine.

worthSeeing.title: Hanoi Old Quarter:
worthSeeing.text: 36 guild streets of French colonial architecture, street food, and the Temple of Literature.
